title: Runechant
description: This Data Pack is meant as a reimagining of Survival Minecraft adding in a multitude of features to enhance progression and existing content as well as create new content for a Survival Player to explore.
body:
PLEASE NOTE THIS PACK IS STILL A WIP CURRENTLY IN STABLE BETA

THE PACK HAS SEVERAL WAYS TO CONGIG OR TEST DIFFERENT FEATURES. AN EASY WAY TO ACCESS THIS IS THROUGH /FUNCTION COMMAND USING THE GLOSSARY: PREFIX. ALTERNATIVELY YOU CAN MANUALLY ENABLE/DISABLE ASPECTS OF THE PACK BY NAVIGATING THROUGH THE CONFIG FOLDER. CHANGE THE SCOREBOARD VALUES FROM 1 TO 0 TO DISABLE THE MODULE. ALL CUSTOM ITEMS OF THE PACK CAN ALSO BE ACCESSED EASILY THROUGH /LOOT AGAIN USING THE GLOSSARY: PREFIX.

Current Data Pack Ver. 0.7.8a
Current Resource Pack Ver. 0.7.8

Current Focus - Balances, Fixes and Optimization but several minor features are currently being worked on. 

The progression of the pack makes ample use of Amethyst and Lodestones, rather than overhauling all the structures/themes, I've created some alternative ways to get Amethyst Shards without exploring the underground heavily. Similar to gravel some stone block (Diorite, Granite, Basalt ect) have a few new drops. These drops can be used to create Amethyst Shards without hopefully devaluing finding Amethyst Buds. Like usually the advancements have more details. Along with that I have also changed the Lodestone recipe from requiring a Netherite Ingot to a Block of Iron, making it a more early-mid game item to pair with its use in the pack. Don't worry there's still plenty of other uses for Netherite, mainly you'll want to save it to duplicate Upgrade Templates.

This Data Pack is meant as a reimagining of Survival Minecraft adding in a multitude of features to enhance progression and existing content as well as create new content for a Survival Player to explore.

Current Features Include:

Several New Multiblock Structures used for NEW crafting
-Rock Crusher (For processing rock type blocks into materials)
-Enchanter's Crucible (For crafting magical items)
-Deepslate Furnace (For processing ores and other crafting)
-Grinding Station (For creating new Crafting Materials)
-Boiling Cauldron (For Brewing)
-Wax Refinery (For Poisonous Wax making)
-Dragon Altar (For creating Mob Eggs)
-End Spawner (Player made Mob Spawners)
-Spell Altar (For crafting Spell Tomes)
-Sculk Forge (For customizing equipment with NEW forms of Enchants and Trims)
-Experience Infuser (For recycling items into experience and other crafting)
-Several Minigame Structures (Used to train the NEW player stat system)

A Rotating Seasonal Cycle effecting biomes differently above and below ground

Functional Trims (Attribute bonuses for Materials, Abilities for Patterns)
Several NEW Materials to trim with and NEW Patterns accessed through different crafting methods

A Hub Dimension "Enchanter's Nexus" (Featuring Minigames, Crafting and Villagers to trade)

Special Inventory Slots used to access other features (Enhanced attributes, Weapon Poisons)

Rebalancing of all equipment through a internal Player Stat System
Stats can be trained through normal gameplay as well as craft-able minigames
A Way to tinker with all equipment to specialize it stats in Defence/Offence/Utility

11 New Advancement tabs to guide the player through all of the above and more

This is a huge pack to overhaul survival Minecraft with a bunch of twist and new adventure, this write up does not begun to cover it properly. With that said the pack is still currently in it's Beta with more features to come along with balance and furthering what already exists. The best way to start is just to play Minecraft normally and see what happens as you slowly explore the vast pack that is Runechant.
